name: Archery Master   Bow and Arrow
description: The game play is to shoot a target with a bow and limited number of arrows and make a great high score. If you have been looking for a new and exciting bow and arrow game then now is your time to master your casual game and archery skills! Archery Master - Bow and Arrow can be played alone or with other people. Share your score with other people and join in the most epic casual game battle of all time.
instructions: Tap on the screen and pull to charge your epic bow area watch the bow and arrow for direction and release Score game points by picking the best angle of attack The physics in this casual game are very realistic and fun to explore
